Emily started her day at the [rescue_name] located at [street_address] with a total of 25 dogs in her care. Over the weekend, she welcomed new arrivals, including 4 puppies on Thursday and 1 stray dog on Friday, which increased her population significantly before the adoptions began. The new arrivals were temporarily housed in the [kennel_section] while the staff worked to find them permanent homes.

On Saturday, the situation changed as 2 families visited the center to adopt dogs, with each family taking 3 dogs home, resulting in a total of 6 dogs leaving the facility. After carefully updating the records in the [database_system] and checking the [inventory_list], Emily calculated that she now has 26 dogs remaining at the [facility_location]. She plans to hold a fundraising event at the [event_venue] next week to support the remaining [animal_count] dogs.

***

The current count reflects the initial 25 dogs plus the 5 new arrivals (4 puppies and 1 stray) minus the 6 adopted dogs, leaving Emily with exactly 26 dogs to care for.
